_meta.description: Quiz for Runtime Data Sampling FLIP-570 lesson

questions.question: Что такое FLIP-570 Runtime Data Sampling (Flink 2.3+) и как работает?

options.text: Live sampling реальных records в Web UI без redeploy. Click 'Sample 100 records' на operator → 1-2 секунды → live data displayed. Архитектура: UI → JM (REST) → TM (RPC) → sampler attaches к mailbox processor → копирует каждую N-ю запись в buffer → return результаты. Near-zero overhead (<1% throughput drop active, 0% inactive)

questions.explanation: FLIP-570 — game changer для production debugging. До этого опции: per-record logging (flood logs), redeploy с debug code (slow), угадывание (slow root cause). Sample size до 1000 records, optional filter (SQL-like expression: userId = 'u_001', amount > 100). Lightweight wrapper на mailbox, fixed-size buffer, autodetach при full/timeout. UI display + REST API для automation. После Web UI click — actual production data visible в 1-2 sec.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Что такое Runtime Data Sampling

questions.question: Какие 5 типовых use cases для Runtime Data Sampling в production?

options.text: (1) Data skew investigation — sample input на busy subtask, identify hot key за 30s. (2) Data quality issues — sample output, find malformed/null/empty fields. (3) Schema evolution — verify все records have new fields. (4) Deduplication verification — filter specific user, check for duplicates. (5) Watermark/event-time issues — sample after window operator, see late events

questions.explanation: FLIP-570 specifically designed для these patterns. Use case 1: hot user / bot pattern detection в 30 seconds (sample shows 80 records single userId). Use case 2: parser issues (sample output sees null amounts, negative values, empty categories). Use case 3: post-deploy verification — confirms new field present в samples. Use case 4: deduplication broken — same txn_id appears twice в filtered sample. Use case 5: watermark misconfiguration — two emissions для same window indicates allowedLateness triggered.

questions.question: Customer report: fraud alerts перестали приходить для high-value transactions ($10k+). Throughput unchanged, no errors. План diagnose с Runtime Sampling?

options.text: Systematic bisection через stages: (1) Sample output Source с filter amount > 10000 — 0 events? Issue upstream. (2) Sample input/output Map (parse) с filter — events dropped? Parser issue. (3) Sample input KeyedProcess (fraud detector) — events arrive? (4) Sample output detector с filter alert_severity=high — 0 alerts emit для high-value? Fraud logic broken. (5) Sample output Sink — alerts written? Diff input/output reveals offending stage. 15 minutes from incident к identified fix. Without sampling: 1-3 hours blind debugging

questions.explanation: Sampling at multiple stages bisects problem space efficiently. Always sample BOTH input и output suspected operator — diff reveals stage transformation. Hypothesis discovered через sampling — likely fraud detector logic broken (recent schema change, rule references field changed semantics). Production lesson: Runtime Sampling shines в these scenarios — narrow-down через stages takes 5-10 minutes. С access control (production), proper PII blocklist для sensitive operators. Train team на using этот diagnostic playbook standard.

questions.question: Runtime Data Sampling — security risk если access не controlled, потому что samples содержат real production data, possibly PII.
questions.explanation: True. Production sampling раскрывает реальные production данные в UI. Без blocklist для PII operators и без access control — это security/compliance violation (GDPR, CCPA для регулируемых юрисдикций). Production config: runtime-sampling.operator-blocklist для PII-sensitive operators (user-pii-processor, payment-handler), runtime-sampling.access-control.enabled: true, required-role flink-debugger. Plus reverse proxy с OAuth2/SSO. Audit log sampling requests. Training: 'sampling != free debugging для anything'. Review с security team перед production rollout.
